AIP Logic Semantic Search Block - Ask the Community - Palantir Developer Community 

 AIP Logic Semantic Search Block 

 Ask the Community 

 aip-logic 

 smitshahngra 

 November 13, 2024, 1:00am

 1 

In AIP logic there is a semantic search block to find closest items based on a property and a query.

What embedding model is used to convert the query and find closest elements to the property specified by the user?

Can the customer/organization admin change the embedding model used to convert the query?

 mhawes 

 November 13, 2024, 1:08am

 2 

Great question, the model used depends on the configuration of the property within the Ontology.

Here is a screenshot of a notional example from the Ontology object type configuration:

 CleanShot 2024-11-12 at 17.06.08@2x 2584×1830 428 KB 

As for enrollment-wide configuration, if you have specific models that you want users to be able to access then these can be registered as custom models (the ‘Foundry ML Live Model’ option).

For more information about semantic search there are some useful resources in our documentation: https://www.palantir.com/docs/foundry/functions/overview-semantic-search/

Let me know if this answers your question!

 1 Like
